[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01010110 4
1 01000000 1
2 10100111 5
3 00110100 3
4 01001101 4
5 11111111 a
6 10011010 4
7 01001110 4
